label: Google — Search & Services Browser
description: Extracted from: real-browser-ceki google-scraper, ceki-marketing session analysis (21 mentions), ceki-comms LinkedIn-phone-gate workaround research. Covers google.com search, Gmail, Google Ads, Google Business Profile, Google login flow, and Google account creation. Anti-bot protection very aggressive (bot-detect.google.com, reCAPTCHA v2/v3). Account creation: phone-free is IP-dependent lottery — sometimes works on clean residential, never on datacenter. IMPORTANT: Google account was theorized as LinkedIn bypass, but Google itself has the same phone-gate problem.
source_patterns: Search: type query (slow, natural pauses) → wait for instant results/suggestions → press Enter → wait 2-4s for SERP → scroll results (short passes, 1-3)
Login flow (email → password → 2FA): type email → wait 2-4s → click Next → wait 1-2s → type password → click Next → if 2FA: wait 3-8s for prompt → handle
Gmail: click email row → wait 1-2s for content load → read → back to inbox → scroll list (gradual)
Google Ads: navigate to campaigns → wait 3-6s for dashboard load → scroll tables → click campaign → wait 2-4s for detail view
Business Profile: navigate to profile → wait 3-5s for dashboard → scroll insights → click edit → wait 2-3s for editor

active_hours.description: Steady use all day — search is constant, Gmail/Ads/Business have work-hour peaks

scroll.description: Search result scanning (short passes, 1-3 per SERP) and Gmail inbox scrolling (gradual list traversal). Source: google-scraper / gmail-scraper patterns
scroll.infinite_scroll_detection: div#rso bottom boundary, document.body.scrollHeight for Gmail

mouse.description: Moderate — deliberate targeting of search results and UI elements

account_creation.phone_free_success_rate: Low — depends on IP cleanliness. Clean residential sometimes works without phone, datacenter always blocked.
account_creation.recommended_approach: 1) Use clean residential IP (rented real browser from ceki marketplace) → 2) Try name/email/password only → 3) If phone required — accept and provide phone, do NOT loop/retry (triggers harder blocks)
steps: 2. Fill first/last name via CDP Runtime.evaluate
3. Fill email/phone fields as they appear
4. reCAPTCHA appears — delegate to provider via chat
6. IMAP check for verification email if phone not required
account_creation.strategic_note: A Google account was theorized as LinkedIn OAuth bypass, but Google itself has the same phone-gate problem. Creating a Google account without phone is IP-dependent lottery — don't rely on it for LinkedIn strategy.

platform_specific.sequence_hint: Search: navigate google.com → type query (slow, think pauses) → wait SERP → scroll (1-3 passes) → click → read → back. Login: email → Next → 2-4s wait → password → Next → 2FA if prompted. Account creation: accounts.google.com/SignUp → fill via CDP → captcha delegation → IMAP check. NOTE: phone-free creation is IP-dependent lottery.
